site.title: SOABOS Dashboard
site.tagline: Visible motion for Bryon’s life, work, and projects.
site.description: A public operating board for goals, projects, current focus, and progress.

data.title: Current Focus
primaryFocus: Stand up the SOABOS Dashboard structure
Turn the dashboard into a visual source of truth for life and work

current.content:
This dashboard is the public-facing operating board for Bryon's goals, projects, and progress.

It should stay simple, visual, and motion-oriented.

data.title: SOABOS Dashboard
data.summary: Build a public personal hub that tracks projects, goals, life areas, and visible progress in one clean dashboard.
data.nextAction: Scaffold the site app and connect it to the content structure.

projects.content:
## Why it exists

To replace scattered tools and mental clutter with one visible system that shows what is active, where progress is happening, and what comes next.

## Current direction

- content-first architecture
- public-safe data only
- website rendered from structured files
- easy to maintain through conversation-driven updates

data.title: Keep life and work visible
data.summary: Build and maintain a dashboard that keeps priorities, progress, and next actions visible from start to finish.

goals.content: The goal is not more notes. The goal is a cleaner operating picture.

data.title: Systems
data.summary: Dashboards, workflows, organization, and tools that reduce chaos and keep motion visible.

areas.content: This area holds the operating systems behind Bryon's work and life visibility.

updates.content:
Created the initial repo structure for a public dashboard that can track goals, projects, areas, and current focus.

Established a content-first model so future updates can be made by editing structured files rather than manually changing the website for every small change.
